Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Production Of Documents And Req. For Appointment Of Referee; Pos
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. There being no appearance, the parties are deemed to have stipulated for the Motion to be heard by a Member of the California Bar serving as Temporary Judge. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs LANGE TRUCKING INC. AND JOHN HOWARD RODGERS (SUED AS JOHN HOWARD RODGERT)'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Appointment Of Referee is GRANTED IN PART. In this personal injury action resulting from a motor vehicle action, plaintiff claims traumatic brain injury. The declaration of David Seidenwurm, M.D. establishes that plaintiff's medical records subpoenaed by Defendants is necessary in order for him to reach a conclusion regarding the etiology of the MRI findings and their relationship to clinical symptoms, and thus offer an opinion as to causality, and will be helpful to the anticipated neuropsychological examination of Plaintiff. The court prepared and signed the order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.

Notice And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - DEFENDANT LANGE TRUCKING INC., RODGERS, JOHN HOWARD (SUED AS JOHN HOWARD RODGERT's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records. Based on no appearances the parties deemed stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem.

Ruling - Plaintiff is agreeable to limiting its supoena to all records that were used by Sentry in connection with the arbitration between Farmers and Sentry. Motioh to quash denied based on plaintiff's willingness to limit scope of requested production. If defendant believes some documents are subject to a privilege objection it will need to identify each specific document which it believes is privileged and the basis for the previlige. If show to the arbitrator of Farmers, there can be no attorney client privilege or any other form of persoenal privacy privilege claim. Prevailing party prepare form of order. Paul Renne Judge Pro Tem, not reported.- 302/JPT
